title: Stored XSS Bug in Jira Work Management Could Lead to Full Organization Takeover

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - Stored XSS Bug in Jira Work Management Could Lead to Full Or
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
